title: YDM's Auto-Run
description: Adds an auto-run keybind to the game.
body:
### **Forge 1.21**

Like the name says, this mod adds an auto-run feature to the game.

**Press V** by default to Run Automatically.

While **auto-running**, you can turn the sprinting on/off with the **sprint** key and

you can do the same with the **sneak** key. 

To **cancel it** you just have to **press** the **up/down(forward/backwards) or** auto-run button **again** (**V** by default).
